SEARCH
Package io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.typeclass

Interface Monad<W>

Type Parameters:
W - The witness type of the monad.
All Superinterfaces:
Applicative<W>, Functor<W>
public interface Monad<W> extends Applicative<W>
A typeclass for applicative functors that support sequential composition.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default <A, B> Higher<W,B>
    ap(Higher<W,Function<A,B>> ff, Higher<W,A> fa)
    Applies a function within an applicative context to a value within an applicative context.
    <A, B> Higher<W,B>
    flatMap(Function<A,Higher<W,B>> fn, Higher<W,A> fa)
    Sequentially composes two monadic actions.
    default <A> Higher<W,A>
    flatten(Higher<W,Higher<W,A>> ffa)
    Flattens a nested monadic structure.

    Methods inherited from interface io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.typeclass.Applicative

    liftA2, map, pure
